scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');function cp(a,b){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(b),{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(a,b,{recursive:true})} fs.writeFileSync('dist/_worker.js','import handler from \"./server/entry.mjs\"\nexport default handler\n');cp('dist/client/_astro','dist/_astro');" && rm -f dist/server/wrangler.json dist/server/.prerender/wrangler.json && rm -rf dist/client .wrangler
